reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
workstream_objective: Freeze the post-Gate-C reality so a Gate D decision can be made without ambiguity. Do not execute B04 civilization activation yet. First decide, under v11 and Omega order, whether KT remains bounded at Gate C-exit posture or authorizes a bounded B04 civilization-ratification attempt.

gate_domain_product_split.gate: Gate D ordered civilization ratification decision phase only
gate_domain_product_split.domain_surface: B04 civilization surfaces are candidate activation surfaces only and do not count until Gate D is explicitly authorized.

decision_questions: Does KT remain a bounded governed execution system at the post-Gate-C posture, or is a bounded B04 civilization-ratification attempt authorized?
Is any future civilization activation limited to one governed and rollback-safe lane only, exactly as Omega B04 states?
Is externality widening still deferred to Gate E rather than smuggled into Gate D?
Are comparator expansion, frontier claims, and commercialization claims still blocked pending later gates?
Are new counting domains beyond Omega B04 still forbidden unless explicitly authorized by later ordered gates?
stop_conditions: Any B04 counted mutation begins before a Gate D decision is explicitly made.
Any externality widening, frontier claim, comparator expansion, or product widening is folded into Gate D by default.
Any tracked carrier or documentary surface is treated as Gate C or Gate D authority.
Any Gate D decision frame outruns Omega batch order or v11 closure order.

pass: The next ordered batch remains B04 under Omega.
The current post-Gate-C state is frozen without ambiguity.
B04 is held behind an explicit Gate D decision rather than executed by default.
fail: B04 is treated as automatically executable after Gate C exit.
Any Gate D decision frame widens externality, frontier, comparator, or product scope by default.
Any current-head authority is sourced from tracked carriers instead of authoritative sealed-head proof.
